zh.lifeSummary: 當John de Wassheburne於大約1357年出生在英國武斯特斯爾時，他的父親Peter de Washborne26歲，母親Isolde Hanley26歲。他於1377年與Joanne Musard結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1429年4月之後在英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾維其福德，埋葬在英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When John de Wassheburne was born about 1357, in Worcestershire, England, his father, Peter de Washborne, was 26 and his mother, Isolde Hanley, was 26. He married Joanne Musard in 1377. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died after April 1429, in Wichenford, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom, and was buried in Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John de Wassheburne est né environ 1357, à Worcestershire, Angleterre, son père, Peter de Washborne, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Isolde Hanley, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Joanne Musard en 1377. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé après avril 1429, à Wichenford, Worcestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, et a été enterré à Worcestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

Lui sposato Joanne Musard nel 1377. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. ja.lifeSummary: John de Wassheburneが約1357年にイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアで生まれた時，父Peter de Washborneは26歳，母Isolde Hanleyは26歳であった。1377年にJoanne Musardと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1429年4月以後にイギリスイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアウィチェンフォードで死去し，イギリスイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John de Wassheburne(이)가 대략 1357년 영국 워스스터실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Peter de Washborne(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Isolde Hanley(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1377년 Joanne Musard(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1429년 4월 이후 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르 위천퍼드에서 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John de Wassheburne nasceu aproximadamente 1357, em Worcestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Peter de Washborne, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Isolde Hanley, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Joanne Musard em 1377. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu após abril de 1429, em Wichenford, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, e foi sepultado em Worcestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Stanford, Worcestershire, England: станфорд он тем, ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда John de Wassheburne родился около 1357 г. в местности ворсестиршир, Англия, его отцу по имени Peter de Washborne было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Isolde Hanley, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Joanne Musard в 1377 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер после апрель 1429 г. в местности вичэнфорд, ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания и был похоронен в местности ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания.
